---
title: 'demographics analysis'
author: "shawn schwartz"
output: html_document
date: "2026-04-18"
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
library(here)
library(targets)
library(tidyverse)
```

```{r}
df_demographics = "data/processed/phenotype/demographics_exclusions_n67.csv" |>
  here() |> 
  read_csv()

df_demographics |> head()
```

## total enrolled in study

```{r}
df_demographics |> nrow()

table(df_demographics$sex)

mean(df_demographics$age) |> round(2)
sd(df_demographics$age) |> round(2)
min(df_demographics$age) 
max(df_demographics$age)
```

## exclusions

```{r}
table(df_demographics$exclude)
```
